.status-bar.background: rgb(38, 27, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(27, 20, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(27, 20, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(27, 20, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(27, 20, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(38, 27, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(38, 27, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(27, 20, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(38, 27, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
